introSection: Ricochet is a Mack Rides Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Carowinds in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Ricochet was announced on October 23, 2001.

The ride opened on March 23, 2002.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Ricochet originally had yellow track with blue supports. For the 2014 season, the track was painted green and the supports blue and teal.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car. The colors of the cars were changed for 2020.

fullText:
Ricochet is a Mack Rides Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Carowinds in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA.

Ricochet was announced on October 23, 2001.

The ride opened on March 23, 2002.



Ricochet originally had yellow track with blue supports. For the 2014 season, the track was painted green and the supports blue and teal.

8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car. The colors of the cars were changed for 2020.
